most_recent_enforcement_milestone: General-purpose AI obligations and governance became applicable on 2 August 2025; Commission proposals (Digital Omnibus, 19 Nov 2025) and EDPB/EDPS joint opinion (10 Feb 2026) are recent developments that could affect timelines.
next_obligations: High-risk AI system obligations (Annex III) scheduled to apply on 2 August 2026; obligations for AI embedded in harmonised products (Annex II) apply 2 August 2027.
main_uncertainties: Delays in development/publication of harmonised technical standards by CEN/CENELEC (may make August 2026 compliance impractical)
Digital Omnibus legislative proposal (19 Nov 2025) could change application dates and procedural rules; not yet law
EDPB/EDPS joint opinion (10 Feb 2026) raises issues around data protection interplay
Variation in Member State designation/capacity of national competent authorities and notified bodies; interpretive guidance (e.g., Article 6 high-risk classification) was delayed

sources.label: European Commission FAQ 'Navigating the AI Act'
EDPS press note on EDPB-EDPS Joint Opinion on Digital Omnibus
